_doc: Fixture saneado: guru corriendo sobre Anthropic CLI emitió un result event stream-json con shape estructural type=result, is_error=true, error_type=usage_limit_error. AKIA/JWT/sk-* fueron redactados antes de pegar. Cross-skill: confirma que el parser unificado clasifica idéntico al detector legacy.
raw: {"type":"result","is_error":true,"error_type":"usage_limit_error","error":"You have reached your weekly usage limit. Resets at 2026-06-03T00:00:00Z.","session_id":"sess_<REDACTED>"}
